## Problem

<!-- What user problem are you trying to solve? Not "add this button" — the underlying user pain. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- The shape of the change, at a level a maintainer can say yes/no to without writing code. -->

## Edition

Which edition do you expect this to live in?

- [ ] Community (AGPL-3.0; in this repo)
- [ ] Enterprise (commercial; panorama-enterprise repo)

If Enterprise, please explain the commercial justification.

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you considered workarounds, existing features, plugins? -->

## Who benefits

- User personas affected:
- Rough share of install base you estimate cares:
